# Container Diagram (C4 Level 2)
<!-- Auto-generated by sentinel scan on 2026-06-18 -->

The deployable units are the major configuration subsystems, each a Stow package, coordinated at runtime through Sketchybar and the shell automation layer.

```mermaid
graph TD
  shell["Shell Env<br/>zsh + starship + mise"]
  wm["Window Mgmt<br/>AeroSpace"]
  bar["Status Bar<br/>Sketchybar (items/ + plugins/)"]
  editor["Editor<br/>Neovim / lazy.nvim"]
  term["Terminal<br/>Ghostty + Tmux"]
  auto["Automation<br/>scripts/scripts (Bun/Bash)"]
  shell -->|dispatches| auto
  bar -->|listens to| wm
  bar -->|invokes| auto
  auto -->|drives| wm
  term -->|hosts| shell
```
